modules.title: Today's Weather
modules.summary: Mostly sunny with partly cloudy conditions. Slight chance of shower in southwest. Light winds expected.

modules.title: Fire Danger & Firepit Safety
modules.summary: Fire danger rated Moderate. Campfires and solid fuel BBQs/pizza ovens ARE permitted today, subject to mandatory safety requirements.

metrics.label: Burning Period Status
metrics.value: Restricted Burning Period (Autumn) - Ends Midnight Sunday 3 May 2026

bullet_points: 3-meter clearance of all flammable material required
Adult must be in attendance at all times
Reliable water supply must be on hand
Fire must be extinguished before leaving
Permit to Burn required during Restricted Burning periods - contact your Fire Control Officer
